title: RNA Imaging with MERFISH - Sample Preparation and Staining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5jg0b","text":"The preparation and staining of samples for MERFISH follows closely the typical protocols used for smFISH (Raj et al., 2008). However, there are a few places in which we have modified these protocols to optimize MERFISH staining. Again, RNase contamination can destroy samples, so care should be taken to work in an RNase-free environment.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"6pg8s","text":"The protocol workflow is as follows: ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":37}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"64r45","text":" ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ddct3","text":"1. Fixation and Permeabilization of Cells (Steps 1-5)","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":53}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2ur01","text":" ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bnaok","text":"The first step in most FISH protocols is to fix the cells and then to permeabilize the membrane using either an overnight incubation in 70% ethanol or a brief exposure to surfactant. We prefer the latter approach since this protocol requires less time; however, we have had reasonable performance with both approaches.  ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4m0pd","text":" ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d3jc4","text":" ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fi2fi","text":"2. Hybridization of Encoding Probes (Steps 5-23) ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":49}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ej34b","text":" ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1pe6a","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"buei5","text":"This protocol will require the following reagents and buffers:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":62}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ajbc8","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f8kac","text":"1.
